query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'ordens_servico' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'status' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3uWnMYqJSMV9zcU.root --database eCW2qMCc4P3oBzxQMhj7Zi --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'ordens_servico' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'status' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
